description: {"description": "Simple leaf, ovate-lanceolate shape, acute apex, entire margin with slight undulation. Venation appears pinnate."} {"description": "Multiple, irregularly shaped lesions present. Lesions exhibit a chlorotic halo surrounding a necrotic center. Some lesions appear slightly raised or textured. Color ranges from pale yellow to brown/black."} Lesions are primarily concentrated on the upper leaf surface, with a non-uniform distribution. Higher density of lesions towards the distal portion of the leaf and along veins. No apparent pattern of distribution (random or clustered).
